# Foundry (SaaS Maker) — full agent brief

Sarthak Agrawal's personal product fleet showcase — shipped apps plus the open-source operating layer that runs them.

## Index

# Foundry (SaaS Maker)

Personal product fleet by Sarthak Agrawal — twenty-something shipped apps plus the operating layer (CLI, cockpit, deploy tooling).

## What it is

- Static showcase at sassmaker.com
- Apps on their own custom domains
- Open-source Foundry stack for running the fleet

## Agent entrypoints

- https://sassmaker.com/llms.txt
- https://sassmaker.com/api/ai
- https://sassmaker.com/index.md
- https://docs.sassmaker.com/llms.txt

## Product links

- Home: https://sassmaker.com/ — Fleet map
- Docs: https://docs.sassmaker.com — Foundry manual
- Cockpit: https://app.sassmaker.com — Operator dashboard (auth)

## Machine surfaces

- https://sassmaker.com/llms.txt
